title: n8n SDLC Project Configuration
description: Project-level configuration for the n8n SDLC system. Created by the get-started wizard or manually from project.json.template.

projectName.description: Optional human-readable project name for display purposes (dashboards, logs). Not used in workflow naming.

n8nProjectId.description: n8n project ID from the workflow URL (projectId=...). Used to lock all MCP operations to this project via n8n_list_workflows and verified via n8n_get_workflow shared[0].projectId.

devPrefix.description: Prefix prepended to workflow names for development copies. PROD workflows keep their original name with no prefix.

workflowsDir.description: Base directory for workflow JSON files, relative to workspace root. Empty string or omitted means workspace root (agents/ and tools/ at top level). Example: 'workflows/' stores files under workflows/agents/ and workflows/tools/.

discoveryMode.description: How workflows were discovered during setup. 'master': traced from a single entry-point workflow. 'full-project': pulled all workflows in the n8n project. Omit for greenfield projects.

masterWorkflowId.description: The n8n workflow ID of the master (entry-point) workflow. Only set when discoveryMode is 'master'. Used by n8n-sdlc-import-project to begin traversal.

folderStrategy.description: Controls how workflow JSON files are organized locally. Set during the get-started wizard.

mode.description: flat: agents/ and tools/ only. categorized: nested hierarchy based on dependency graph and workflow type.

dedicatedTools.description: Only used when mode=categorized. flat: all tools in tools/. grouped: tools/{parent-name}/. alongside: same folder as calling agent.

credentials.description: Map credential aliases to their environment-specific n8n IDs. Only for credentials that differ between dev and prod. During promotion, iterate aliases and replace any node credential whose ID matches the 'dev' value with the 'prod' value.

dev.description: n8n credential ID for dev environment

prod.description: n8n credential ID for prod environment

git.description: Git sync settings for the project repo. Controls automatic commit/push after SDLC operations and the branch model.

enabled.description: Whether to auto-commit and push after SDLC operations. Set to false to disable all git sync.

devBranch.description: Branch name for day-to-day development. All push/pull/seed operations commit here.

mainBranch.description: Branch name that mirrors production state. Updated via PR after promotions.

autoPush.description: Whether to auto-push to remote after each commit. If false, commits are local only until manually pushed.

slotCreator.description: Optional config for automated slot creation via helper workflow. When configured, the reserve skill can auto-create empty workflow slots instead of requiring manual creation in the n8n UI.

webhookUrl.description: Webhook URL of the slot-creator helper workflow deployed in your n8n instance.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this project was initialized
